description: Create a fully constrained 2D sketch of a 2-way speaker baffle for CNC routing in SolveSpace. The baffle must feature a 200 mm wide by 350 mm tall rectangular outer boundary with a 75 mm diameter tweeter cutout and a 145 mm diameter woofer cutout. Constrain both cutouts to be centered horizontally and vertically aligned with each other. The tweeter center must be positioned 80 mm from the top edge, with a 130 mm distance between the tweeter and woofer centers. Save the layout file to /home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/speaker_baffle.slvs.
